name: Onion Soup with Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add the sliced sweet onions and sauté until they are light golden brown and soft in texture.
3. Stir in chopped tomatoes, salt, and pepper.
4. Gradually add water to the mixture, stirring occasionally, until it reaches a simmer.
5. Continue simmering for 5-10 minutes.
6. Carefully break eggs into individual bowls before sliding them gently into the onion mixture, allowing them to poach in the soup.
7. Serve the soup over slices of dry Italian bread with two poached eggs on top.
